title: Nevlers 12PK 8 Oz Glass Bottles with Lids | Leakproof Boston Round Bottles | Blue Glass Bottles with Caps | Small Glass Bottles for Vanilla Extract Homemade, Apothecary Bottles, Glass Perfume Bottle
description:
About this item
Quality, Protective Dark Glass Bottles : Safely bottle & store your favorite concoctions w/ Nevlers' small glass bottles with lids 8 oz . These twist-cap 8 oz glass bottle leak proof are made from thick, cobalt blue glass that fuses style & practicality. The durable blue glass of these small glass bottles for liquids protects your belongings from UV-damage, maintaining their quality for longer. These homemade vanilla extract bottles 8 oz. offer 8 oz. of storage for your favorite liquids.
Verstaile Blue Bottles : Embrace DIY essentials with Nevlers' small bottles for vanilla extract , ideal for homemade tinctures, serums, or oils. These glass vanilla extract bottles add elegance to your creations, whether you're gifting these glass bottles with caps 8 oz or keeping them around the house. Their versatility extends to cosmetics, beard oil, perfumes, or any DIY creations, making them the go-to glass medicine bottles with lids for all your apothecary & beauty products.
Bottle with Lid Set & Accesories: Unlock practicality with Nevlers' 8oz bottles with lids kit & extras, featuring 12 stylish 8 oz bottle with caps set, a chalk marker, & chalkboard labels for easy identification. The dark glass bottle set also includes a small, clear plastic funnel for effortless filling and a convenient bottle brush for easy and efficient cleaning of your glass travel bottles . Enjoy effortless style and organization with this all-in-one little glass bottles set.
Compact Small Bottles with Lids : Choose our travel-friendly mini bottles with lids , perfect for taking on-the-go or maximizing your space at home. The sleek reusable bottles with lids effortlessly slip into your travel bag, ensuring you're well-equipped wherever you go with your favorite cosmetics. At home, these 8 ounce glass bottles with lids integrate seamlessly & stylishly into your kitchen & cabinets. Stylish & functional, say hello to your go-to solution for both home & travel.
Customer Care Comes First: At Nevlers, we believe our customers' satisfaction comes first. We back our premium products like our 8oz glass bottles with caps set w/ a 1-year limited warranty. Feel free to reach out to us for any questions regarding our glass bottles with lids 8 oz , whether they are used as bulk glass bottles for cologne, glass spray bottles for essential oils, atomizer cocktail, vanilla bottles for homemade vanilla extract , or coffee bean misters.
reviews_5s: I used these bottles to make vanilla extract. They are perfect! They don’t leak and are the perfect size for making vanilla extract. Good deal for what I am using them.Bought these bottles to make homemade vanilla extract to give as gifts. They are perfect for the job, and I appreciated the extras -- the labels, the pen, and the shrink wrap with instructions. I was able to get the shrink wrap on with a blow dryer and it worked! That's a nice extra since I'm mailing a couple of these and it will further protect from spillage.I use this bottles for tinctures, basil and rosemary perfect for what I needed. Good quality.The packaging was nice and the bottles will be perfect for my homemade vanilla extract that I plan on giving away for gifts.Loved how well the product was packaged to get to me safely! The bottles are great and being able to add the seal was a great touch and benefit of buying this product!Simple and straight forward, these bottles do what they are supposed to do and do it well. Making tincture and extracts at home as gifts for family and friends. These bottles are cute and fit the bill.Came in perfect condition, fast deliveryI use these primarily for making vanilla extract which is really simple to make. They work very nicely and restrict sunlight from getting to the bottle contents.The bottles were a reasonable price, and they arrived on time.Works great for the vanilla extract!
reviews_1s: I needed to transport 8 oz of apple cider vinegar in my luggage. I only wanted to take one bottle with me. When I opened the box I saw that there were 12 2ounce bottles with droppers/lids and not screw on lids like the description said. They came with a funnel so I divided my ACV into four 2oz bottles with droppers. I placed them in ziplock sandwich bags and wrapped them in bubble wrap so they should be safe in checked luggage. I will come back and update this review after I complete my travel to indicate if they were sturdy enough, if they leaked, and if they should be deemed appropriate for travel. In theory, the smaller bottles would make them "legal" to take through TSA screenings. I'm not sure all 4 would fit in a quart size bag though, along with my other liquids.I received a case of 12 bottles without a single cap!I think I would love the product if the lids had come with them.
